title: Extreme Heat Advisories/Warnings - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Extreme Heat Advisories/Warnings 34 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness 211INFO GORGE CITIZEN ALERT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info is working in partnership with Gilliam, Hood River, Sherman, and Wasco Counties to support community members who require assistance signing up for local emergency alert systems. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details COOLING CENTERS BENTON COUNTY BENTON COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT COOLING SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on cooling centers during an extreme heat event. May offer additional cooling resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Cooling centers operate during heat advisories. Locations are open either throughout the summer season or when temperature thresholds are met.
